landing.heroSub: An AI coach explains <0>every decision in real time</0> — equity, pot odds, opponent range. Animated Range Vision, simulation that <1>proves</1> your edge, cash & tournament training. Become the player others fear.
landing.ctaNote: No credit card · free to start
landing.hook1Desc: On every hand, the coach explains the +EV move: equity, pot odds, opponent range. You understand why — and you improve fast.
landing.hook2Desc: Watch the opponent's range tighten action by action. An animated range read you won't find anywhere else.
landing.hook3Desc: The simulation bench runs thousands of tournaments to PROVE, with hard numbers, that the coach's decisions win.
landing.featuresSub: One tool, from beginner to grinder.
landing.fCash: Play cash with a live coach.
landing.fSim: Measure EV over thousands of hands.
landing.pricingTitle: Start free. Go Pro whenever you want.
landing.finalSub: Join the community and let the coach level you up.
landing.footerDisclaimer: Poker training tool — no real-money gambling, no monetary winnings.

trainer.subtitle: Preflop ranges & postflop spot reading
trainer.howTrain: How do you want to train?
trainer.standardD: Train on the reference ranges already built into the app.
trainer.customD: Edit your own ranges by position (green/red/yellow/grey), then train on them.
trainer.spotReadD: Postflop: diagnose each hand — texture, range, equity, and your bucket (Air / Value / Bluff-catch / Draw).
trainer.decisionD: Facing a bet: pick the right move (fold / call / raise / bet / check). Reflex mode with a timer. The decision + the why.

hist.title: History
hist.subtitle: Your finished sessions — only the hands you played (highlights) are kept

hist.hintCash: Finish a cash session to find it here.
